summary: For a critically hemorrhaging parturient requiring immediate cesarean delivery under emergency conditions, general anesthesia is preferred to ensure swift intubation and access during an already compromised situation involving hypotension. \boxed{General anesthesia} Summary: Due to severe maternal hypotension and the need for expedited care, general anesthesia is recommended for performing a lower segment Caesarean section immediately upon admission. \boxed{General anesthesia}
